item.title: This is still one of the weirdest things I’ve come across as a snake breeder.
item.description: A strange and fascinating moment from the world of snake breeding that still stands out as one of the most unusual discoveries.

media:content.media:title: This is still one of the weirdest things I’ve come across as a snake breeder.
media:content.media:description: A strange and fascinating moment from the world of snake breeding that still stands out as one of the most unusual discoveries.

item.title: I wasn’t expecting this, and I’m not even sure how it happened. But I did my best to respond—and really, that’s all any of us can do when life throws surprises our way. Now we’ll see if it hatches without any issues.
item.description: An unexpected situation led to a quick fix for the egg and now the wait begins to see if it will hatch successfully.

media:content.media:title: I wasn’t expecting this, and I’m not even sure how it happened. But I did my best to respond—and really, that’s all any of us can do when life throws surprises our way. Now we’ll see if it hatches without any issues.
media:content.media:description: An unexpected situation led to a quick fix for the egg and now the wait begins to see if it will hatch successfully.

item.title: Just a few more days and we will see how our patched up egg makes it!
item.description: The patched egg is almost ready to hatch and the next few days will reveal if the careful repair worked.

media:content.media:title: Just a few more days and we will see how our patched up egg makes it!
media:content.media:description: The patched egg is almost ready to hatch and the next few days will reveal if the careful repair worked.

item.title: I took Scout, my Sonoran gopher snake, out for some fresh air and sunshine today! Later, he got a well-deserved treat: a pinky mouse
item.description: Scout the Sonoran gopher snake enjoys some fresh air and sunshine before getting a well deserved pinky mouse treat.

media:content.media:title: I took Scout, my Sonoran gopher snake, out for some fresh air and sunshine today! Later, he got a well-deserved treat: a pinky mouse
media:content.media:description: Scout the Sonoran gopher snake enjoys some fresh air and sunshine before getting a well deserved pinky mouse treat.

item.title: One egg clutch!
item.description: A look at this single egg clutch and the life growing inside.

media:content.media:title: One egg clutch!
media:content.media:description: A look at this single egg clutch and the life growing inside.

item.title: This Snake is tangled in his umbilical cord!
item.description: This baby snake is tangled in its umbilical cord and needs a little help.

media:content.media:title: This Snake is tangled in his umbilical cord!
media:content.media:description: This baby snake is tangled in its umbilical cord and needs a little help.
